name: kramar-studio-marketplace
description: Marketplace hosting Kramar IT Studio role plugins (product, ops, security). Companion to archforge-marketplace; same methodology, different roles.

plugins.name: product
plugins.description: Product management toolkit: market-scan (rare) + per-feature cycle Discover → Define → Spec → Validate, with prioritize over backlog. Artifacts (HYP/PRD/SPEC/VAL/SCAN) cross-link to ADRs from the `architect` plugin.

plugins.name: architect
plugins.description: Architecture toolkit: Discover → Design → Decide → Document → Review cycle, with skills for C4, ADR, system design, code review, and research. Router skill is `architect:role`. Absorbed from archforge-marketplace per ADR-0001.
